name: grant-agent
description: Skills for writing federal research grant proposals (NIH, NSF, DoD, foundations)

plugins.name: grant-writing
plugins.description: 20 skills covering the full grant lifecycle: project setup, specific aims, title, budget, significance, innovation, approach, letters of support, timelines, abstracts, biosketches, facilities, data management plans, compliance sections, mock review, proofreading, references, format check, and resubmission.
